scope: per-query cohort_tag alignment verification for the 94.0 cohort gate
learner_facing_quality_improvement: The qrel verifier now rejects baseline cohort reports whose per-query cohort tags drift away from the 200-query fixture, so cohort-level learner-facing regressions cannot hide behind matching totals and query_id sets.
notes: This wave stayed inside the qrel verifier, its narrow unit test, and a lane-local report artifact.
The new guard catches stale per-query metadata even when per-cohort totals and query_id sets still look healthy.
